name: Sweet'n' Sour Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 large Green Pepper, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a crockpot, combine carrots, green pepper, and onion.
2. Sprinkle tapioca over the vegetables.
3. Place frozen chicken pieces atop the vegetables.
4. For sauce, in a small bowl combine undrained pineapple, brown sugar, vinegar, soy sauce, bouillon, garlic powder, and ginger.
5. Pour the sauce over the chicken pieces.
6. Cover; cook on low-heat setting for 10-12 hours or on high-heat setting for 5-6 hours.
7. Serve over rice.
